22:42**\
Vrijen Attawar\
So right now it is getting, basically getting job descriptions in that
we can then drop into shivam\'s mailing list, which then gets developers
to raise their hand and say, hey, I\'d like to apply. And it is at that
point either by first surfacing the person to the employer and getting
feedback or proactively saying, hey, go to Careerspan. We one way or the
other drive people to Careerspan and get them to say stories. So we\'re
trying to have our cake and eat it too, in the sense that we are trying
to rapidly surface resumes and hope that one of them connects and while
still automatically taking that feedback and driving it back to
candidates. So went from three candidates at the start of the week to
about 10 that are all reasonably qualified engineers that could get,
have a realistic chance of getting placed.

23:46**\
Vrijen Attawar\
